text:
The Two-headed Wolf (, Futakubi Ōkami—lit. "Two-necked Wolf") is an endangered species. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 7 

Background

At some point, Ging Freecss established a breeding program for the Two-headed Wolf. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

In a flashback involving Kite and a younger Gon, Kite informs the boy that one of Ging's achievements was the creation of a breeding program for the Two-headed Wolf. 

Trivia

The species is referred to in the plural, "two-headed wolves", in the 2011 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 76 (2011) [19:54.47-58.49 min.] 

Anime and Manga Differences

The Two-headed Wolf is not mentioned in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 7 (1999) 
In the 2011 anime adaptation, the Two-headed Wolf is mentioned much later in the story due to the anime differences in how Gon and Kite met.
